violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): A few wiping cloth buckets noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution. ( change-out more frequently )

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some floor and ceiling areas in food prep areas and ware-washing room noted in need of cleaning and repair. Stainless stgeel area behind dishmachine needs recaul tro wall; a couple ceiling tiles are missing.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Shelving inside lower coolers behind front bar noted not in good repair.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle was not provided inside the women's toilet stalls. (All Day)
PREMISES (1 pts): Wet mop noted stored in sink.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): A few food bins noted not properly labeled (main).
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): A few wiping cloths buckets with in- adequate sanitizing solution.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): A few shelving units inside walkin coolers noted in need of cleaning (both kitchens). Pop gun drain behind bar noted in need of routine cleaning. (Tap House)
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Reachin cooler behind bar noted with no thermometer - milk stored here. (Tap House)

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling areas in (main kitchen) need cleaning. Holes in wall near janitor sink (main) need repair. Floor in (main) dishwashing area noted not in good repair. Dishwashing stainless steel in (main) needs recaulk to wall. Floor inside (mian) walkin freezer needs rouitine cleaning. Floor in (Tap House) prep area noted not in good repair. Floor beneath shelving inside walkin cooler ( Tap House) Ceiling vent fans in both restrooms (Tap House) need cleaning.
